axioms.title: Mean reversion
axioms.body: Extreme intraday moves toward VWAP often fade in liquid Core14 names — size smaller when vol expands.
axioms.pt: Reversão à média — afastamentos extremos tendem a voltar ao VWAP

axioms.title: Risk first
axioms.body: Size from stop distance and daily loss budget — never from hope or last trade P&L.
axioms.pt: Risco primeiro — tamanho pela distância do stop

axioms.title: Structure over direction
axioms.body: A defined options structure caps max loss; naked delta scalps need tighter time stops.

axioms.title: Session timing
axioms.body: First 30 min and last hour carry spread noise — prefer mid-session for pair mean reversion.
axioms.pt: Horário da sessão importa para spread

axioms.title: Max pain gravity
axioms.body: Near expiry, index options gravitate toward max pain — useful for BOVA hedge context.
axioms.pt: Max pain atrai preço perto do vencimento
